product_overview: ERP KSI is a modular Odoo 17 ERP focused on sales operations, master data management, and role-based access. It supports customer address management, sales order processing, invoicing, and linked ship-to/bill-to handling across the sales lifecycle.
core_goals: Provide structured customer master data with hierarchical address management
Enable flexible selection and display of Sold To, Ship To, and Bill To addresses
Support sales order and invoice workflows with correct address resolution
Maintain consistent UI behavior using Odoo form view patterns and read-only controls
Preserve data integrity through auto-selection, onchange logic, and related record linking

features.name: Sold To/Ship To/Bill To Tree View Toggle
features.description: Allows users to switch between Tree and Kanban views for customer-related address tabs, improving visibility and browsing of Sold To, Ship To, and Bill To records.
user_flows: GET /web/dataset/call_kw on customer address records to load Tree view data -> User clicks Tree/Kanban toggle -> Client updates view mode -> Receive rendered address list in Tree layout
GET /web/dataset/call_kw on customer address records to load Kanban view data -> User clicks Tree/Kanban toggle -> Client renders custom Kanban cards -> Receive address cards grouped by selected tab
GET /web/dataset/call_kw with invalid or empty customer context -> View toggle attempted -> Server returns empty result set -> UI shows no address records or fallback empty state

features.name: Ship To and Bill To Selection on Sales Order
features.description: Adds Ship To and Bill To Many2one fields to sales orders and quotations, with automatic selection from the customer’s stored addresses when available.
user_flows: GET /web/dataset/call_kw for sales order form defaults with selected customer -> System resolves matching Ship To and Bill To addresses -> Form displays populated ship_to_id and bill_to_id -> User saves order successfully

POST /web/dataset/call_kw to create sales order with customer but no matching Ship To/Bill To -> System returns default order with empty or fallback address fields -> User manually selects valid addresses -> PUT /web/dataset/call_kw saves order with selected addresses

POST /web/dataset/call_kw to create sales order with invalid Ship To or Bill To reference -> Server rejects record creation or update -> Receive validation error -> User corrects address selection and resubmits

features.name: Bill To Selection on Invoice
features.description: Adds a Bill To field on invoices and resolves invoice billing address based on the selected Bill To record, supporting accurate billing output and downstream document generation.
user_flows: GET /web/dataset/call_kw for invoice form with linked sales order -> System loads bill_to_id from selected order or customer context -> Form displays resolved Bill To address -> User posts invoice successfully
POST /web/dataset/call_kw to create invoice with valid bill_to_id -> System resolves billing address for invoice output -> Invoice is created with billing details -> User reviews and posts invoice
POST /web/dataset/call_kw to create or update invoice with invalid bill_to_id -> Server returns validation or relation error -> Invoice is not saved -> User selects a valid Bill To record and retries

features.name: Sold To/Ship To/Bill To Tree View Toggle
features.description: Add Tree/Kanban view toggle buttons on Customer form tabs for Sold To, Ship To, and Bill To addresses

known_limitations.issue: Kanban view is custom-rendered from table data, not native Odoo kanban
known_limitations.impact: Kanban view may not have full Odoo kanban features like grouping/sorting

features.name: Ship To and Bill To Selection on Sales Order
features.description: Add ship_to_id and bill_to_id Many2one fields on Sales Order model and Quotation form, with auto-selection from customer addresses

features.name: Bill To Selection on Invoice
features.description: Add bill_to_id Many2one field on Invoice model and form view, with address resolution logic using selected bill_to_id
